title.en: Ye Tian set out from the Terran Holy Kingdom an...

content.en:
Old Mountains.

Ye Tian set out from the Terran Holy Kingdom and headed here.

On the way, he sensed some Eternal Dao Realm aura, and they were hiding around the territory of the Terran Holy Kingdom, blocking this place.

Once the Eternal Dao Realm of the Terran Holy Kingdom comes out, it will be attacked by them.

Ye Tian waved his hand, and invisible fluctuations spread.

Airplanes!

The Eternal Dao Realm whose name was hidden in the shadows was shattered one after another, even the Eternal Dao Realm with a perfect Eternal Dao Body, under Ye Tian's attack, could not survive and died one after another.

With this casual attack, at least thirty Eternal Dao Realms fell on the spot.

For Ye Tian, this is just a small punishment.

......

Soon, Ye Tian arrived at the Old Day Mountain.

The Old Day Mountain is a treasure land, and near the Old Day Mountain, huge cities have been built, and the cultivation environment in this "480" is also very good.

When Ye Tian came here, a famous Eternal Dao Realm shuttled here, looking prosperous.

Ye Tian descended here and went straight to the Old Sun Mountain.

At this time, the formation of the old mountain intercepted him.

"Broken!"

Ye Tian blasted away, and the formation continued to shatter.

This blow directly shocked the members of the Old Day Mountain, and they were shocked one by one.

"Enemy attack!"

A person named Eternal to the Dao Realm was terrified, and they were afraid that they would be killed by the aftermath of the attack, so they hid one by one.

And the realm gods of the old Sun Mountain came out, and the ice sun realm gods also came out, so they naturally recognized Ye Tian.

"The old leader, he is Ye Tian, the lord of the Terran Holy Kingdom!"

The Ice Sun Realm God said.

The God of the Old Sun Realm was very annoyed at this moment, the Lord of the Terran Holy Country, the Beginning of the Eternal Realm God Realm, dared to attack the Old Sun Mountain.

This is not to take the old mountains in your eyes!

Although here, he can't kill Ye Tian, otherwise he will be held accountable by some guys in the Realm Court, but there is no problem in severely invading him, just find a chance to kill him in the future, so that the Realm Court can't find a handle.

"Xuanchuan Realm God, Ice Sun Realm God, the two of you will strike together and hit Ye Tian to me hard. I will urge the formation and suppress his strength. The Old Sun God commanded.

He is the leader of the Old Sun Mountain, he doesn't need to make a move, just let the other world gods make a move, otherwise let the outside world know, and think that the Old Sun Mountain has no realm gods!

"Yes!"

The gods of the Xuanchuan Realm and the Gods of the Ice Sun Realm responded.

Immediately, they went to attack Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!!!

A large array of the Old Sun Mountain was activated, covering the surrounding area to suppress Ye Tian's strength.

And the Xuanchuan Realm God and the Ice Sun Realm God also made a move, in the eyes of the other Old Mountain Realm Gods, these two Eternal Realm God Realm Beginner Realm Realm Gods Immortal

However, they were all horrified in the next second.

"Sun's Grip!"

Ye Tian performed this Eternal Dao Secret Technique and directly pinched the Ice Sun Realm God.

The Ice Sun Realm God, who had condensed an Eternal Realm Spirit, couldn't move his body, and it was useless for him to be unable to resist.

He even urged his Eternal Realm Spirit and cast the Eternal Realm Spirit Technique, but he couldn't break Ye Tian's grasp of the ruin.

Click!

The body of the Ice Sun Realm God was crushed, and although it did not fall, it was already a heavy blow.

And the full force of the Xuanchuan Realm God hit Ye Tian's body, and the move he performed was the Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique-the Light of the Old Day.

The Light of the Old Day, the Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique, comes from the Eternal Realm Spirit, the Old Sun Divine Ape, which is one of the inheritances of the Old Sun Mountain, and the first Eternal Realm Spirit of the Xuanchuan Realm God is the Old Sun Divine Ape Inheritance.

The Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique, an attack type of Old Light, is also quite good.

However, when the light of the old sun bombarded Ye Tian's body, it was resisted by the Tianyan Scale Armor Technique, and it didn't hurt Ye Tian at all.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian struck casually, directly shattering half of the body of the Xuanchuan Realm God.

At this point, the gods of the Xuanchuan Realm were severely injured and lost their combat effectiveness.

Ye Tian didn't kill them, if he wanted to kill them, they wouldn't be able to live.

These realm gods of the old mountain are also one of the members of the realm court, and on the surface, the members of the realm court are still not allowed to kill each other, unless there is no evidence to be found.

But he went directly to the Old Day Mountain, and unless he could kill all the creatures here without leaving a trace, nothing would happen.

But obviously, this is too difficult, and any creature who can pass on the news will be doomed.

Therefore, he only came to teach the old mountains........

"Look for death!"

The Old Sun Realm God was annoyed, and directly held an Eternal Realm Treasure and killed Ye Tian.

The two sides fought in an instant, but with just one move, the defensive Eternal Realm Treasure on the body of the Old Sun Realm God was shattered by Ye Tian with one hand.

Rumble!

The body of the Old Sun Realm God was knocked into the air, collapsing the formation.

Immediately after, his body crashed into the layers of void in the Old Sun Mountain, and countless palaces collapsed.

Ye Tian leaped forward step by step, stepped into the depths of the Old Sun Mountain, and continued to attack the Old Sun Realm God, using the Old Sun Realm God as a leather ball to hit, and the entire Old Sun Mountain was constantly destroyed by Ye Tian.

The other gods of the world were all stunned at this time, and they didn't dare to participate in it at all!

Even the Old Sun Realm Gods who had condensed the three Eternal Realm Spirits were not Ye Tian's opponents, they were like ants, where were they Ye Tian's opponents, how could they dare to step forward to stop them?

Soon.

The gods of the old world have been severely wounded and dying, but they are not really dead.

"God of the Old Sun Realm, do you still want to subdue my Terran Holy Kingdom?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Don't dare!"

The Old Sun Realm God shook his head with difficulty.

"Your old mountain attacked the Eternal Dao Realm of my Terran Holy Country and blocked the Terran Holy Country, how can this matter be counted?"

Ye Tian asked.

The God of the Old Sun Realm hurriedly said, "I will compensate for the loss of the Terran Holy Kingdom!"

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently, 4.1, Ye Tian discussed with the gods of the old mountain in the old days, and the old days mountain took out some resources and some treasure land, and ceded them to the human holy country.

At this point, Ye Tiancai completely let go of the old mountain.

After that, Ye Tian took the agreement and left.

After Ye Tian left, the old realm gods announced that they would heal their wounds, and asked the other realm gods not to provoke the Terran Holy Kingdom.

This time, the gods of the old world were completely afraid.

In his opinion, Ye Tian's strength was not weaker than the middle-level powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm at all, and when Ye Tian broke through to the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, how terrifying was that strength?

This kind of existence is not something he can provoke at all, if Ye Tian is willing, he can even directly join those top powers!

Those top forces in the Eastern Wu Jieyu will come to recruit Ye Tian, how dare he provoke.

So, he's completely convinced.
